flags.reason: No output preceded its source timestamp.
No negative delivery latency was observed.
Primary score components are not uniformly perfect.
The run produced output or no frames were delivered.
The runner does not expose annotation paths to the model.
Local execution does not prove the Linux container network boundary.
Runner resource and isolation evidence is present.

component_eligibility.acquisition: on_screen and eligible_for_detection with an observed confirmed or reacquired match
component_eligibility.continuity_coverage: on_screen and eligible_for_detection with any gated match
component_eligibility.localization: any observed gated match, including an ineligible row when geometry is scored
component_eligibility.observed_coverage: on_screen and eligible_for_detection with an observed gated match

score_explanation.positive_credit_meaning: component_counts records positive credit, while coverage_denominators records eligible rows including misses

evidence: Ground truth remained visible and eligible.
No correct observed match existed during each gap.
interpretation.statement: Eligible visible targets had observed-output gaps beyond the configured tolerance.

possible_causes: Frame processing may be falling behind.
Detection or association may be intermittent.

evidence: Acquisition and coverage were calculated from fresh deterministic matches.
interpretation.statement: The system missed a substantial portion of eligible target observations.

possible_causes: Localization or class output may fail matching gates.

evidence: The deterministic match history contains an output track-ID transition.
interpretation.statement: Matched physical targets changed output identity during the run.

possible_causes: Track IDs may be recreated too aggressively.

evidence: Deterministic gated matching left the track records unmatched.
interpretation.statement: One or more output tracks could not be associated with an on-screen target.

possible_causes: A distractor may be classified as a target.
Track termination may be too permissive.

limitations: GPU metrics are reported only when nvidia-smi is available.
Version 1 evidence overlays use synthetic source frames and MP4V when the local codec is available.
Statistical comparison confidence is sample-count based; confidence intervals are not inferred.

provenance.bounded_audit_evidence_hash_algorithm: sha256(cvbench.canonical-json/v1); authoritative after Worker JSON parsing

evaluation_order.public_calibration_note: Scenario manifests and calibration clips are public and recognizable; this ordering and the run-scoped sequence IDs do not provide secrecy.
